{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Karoshan commander
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan commander]] has one red organic eye and one blue cybernetic eye.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Karoshan commander]] is using a wand authorized by the [[King Regent]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“The King Regent authorized me to use this wand and granted me Aethertech for my hunt.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
